rulings.Case Title: KERRY GREEN VS. YORK CLAIMS SERVICE INC et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 23, 2009, line 9, DEFENDANT YORK CLAIMS SERVICE INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. Motion for Change of Venue is denied. Defendant is a foreign corporation that has not designated a principal place of business with California in its Statement of Information. Venue is proper in San Francisco. Insufficient showing that the convenience of witnesses and ends of justice would be promoted by the change. Requests for attorney's fees are denied. =(302CWW/xCH)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MARJORIE AVERY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing For Relief From Claim Requirement
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 23, 2009, line 11, PETITIONER MARJORIE AVERY, NOELLE AVERY, and, DJESON AVERY'S Notice Of Hearing For Relief From Claim Requirement. Petition is denied. Police incident report states Officer Lam spotted the suspect, turned on his lights while making a U-turn, turned off his lights and followed the suspect for approximately six blocks before the accident. The information suggests that Officer Lam may have been partially responsible for the accident and triggered the petitioners' duty to investigate. Insufficient evidence presented that Petitioners were prevented from conducting a reasonable investigation. =(302CWW/VC)
